title: Fix invalid use of non-static data member (#6659)

features.name: parameterized virtual class static function with local variables and parameter-dependent loop
features.description: Code should include a parameterized virtual class with a static function that declares local variables and uses a for loop with a parameter-dependent range

features.name: static function calling another class static function via scope resolution
features.description: Code should include a static function in a parameterized virtual class that calls a static function of another parameterized virtual class using scope resolution operator

features.name: parameterized module instantiating with localparam
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module instantiation where the parameter is driven by a localparam
